zh.Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechteld van Heusden於大約1245年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德阿斯培倫時，她的父親Jan van Heusden27歲，母親Aleidis van Arenberg22歲。她和Otto I van Arkel至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1283年4月在荷蘭利包格可洛姆享年39歲。

zh-hans.Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mechteld van Heusden于大约1245年出生在荷兰-拉藍德阿斯培倫时，她的父亲Jan van Heusden27岁，母亲Aleidis van Arenberg22岁。她和Otto I van Arkel至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1283年4月在荷兰利包格可洛姆享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Heusden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ousden (Suffolk) with prosthetic initial H-. The placename derives from Old English ūf ‘owl’ (genitive ūfes) + denu ‘valley’.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechteld van Heusden was born about 1245, in Asperen, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Jan van Heusden, was 27 and her mother, Aleidis van Arenberg, was 22. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Otto I van Arkel. She died about April 1283, in Heukelom, Limburg, Netherlands, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mechteld van Heusden est née environ 1245, à Asperen, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan van Heusden, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Aleidis van Arenberg, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Otto I van Arkel. Elle est décédée environ avril 1283, à Heukelom, Limbourg, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mechteld van Heusden um 1245 in Asperen, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jan van Heusden 27 und ihre Mutter Aleidis van Arenberg 22. Sie hatte mit Otto I van Arkel mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um April 1283 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Heukelom, Limburg, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mechteld van Heusden è nata il circa 1245 nel Asperen, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Jan van Heusden, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Aleidis van Arenberg, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Otto I van Arkel. Morì circa aprile 1283, nel Heukelom, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mechteld van Heusdenが約1245年にオランダズイド-hオランドアスペレンで生まれた時，父Jan van Heusdenは27歳，母Aleidis van Arenbergは22歳であった。彼女はOtto I van Arkelとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1283年4月にオランダリンブルグヘウケロムで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mechteld van Heusden(이)가 대략 1245년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 아스페런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jan van Heusden(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aleidis van Arenberg(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Otto I van Arkel(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1283년 4월 네덜란드 림버그 헤우켈롬에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1245–Abt April 1283: tany ho any amin'ny 1245–tany ho any amin'ny aprily 1283

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mechteld van Heusden nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Asperen, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan van Heusden, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Aleidis van Arenberg, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Otto I van Arkel. Ela faleceu aproximadamente abril de 1283, em Heukelom, Limburgo, Países Baixos, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mechteld van Heusden родилась около 1245 г. в местности аспирен, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Jan van Heusden было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleidis van Arenberg, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Otto I van Arkel. Она умерла около апрель 1283 г. в местности хеукелом, лимбург, Нидерланды в возрасте 39 лет.

sm.Abt 1245–Abt April 1283: e tusa o le 1245–e tusa o le Aperila 1283

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mechteld van Heusden nació aproximadamente 1245, en Asperen, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jan van Heusden, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Aleidis van Arenberg, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Otto I van Arkel. Murió aproximadamente abril de 1283, en Heukelom, Limburg, Países Bajos, a la edad de 39 años.
